name: pilotswarm
description: A durable execution runtime for GitHub Copilot SDK agents. Crash recovery, durable timers, session dehydration, and multi-node scaling — powered by duroxide.

scripts.test:local: node --env-file=../../.env test/local/smoke.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/durability.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/multi-worker.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/commands.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/sub-agents.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/kv-transport.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/cms-consistency.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/contracts.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/chaos.test.js & node --env-file=../../.env test/local/system-agents.test.js & wait

author: Affan Dar
